content:
🔥 Raven | Swift
🎯 Primary Use Case: Enabling users to interact with and gain insights from their documents through a local, private AI assistant on macOS and iOS.
✨ Key Features: • Text extraction from images, PDFs, audio, and video files • Audio transcription and video text extraction • Smart Q&A and contextual content analysis • Local AI processing using Apple Foundation Models • Project creation and file organization
📖 Summary: Raven is a privacy-focused document chat application for macOS and iOS that allows users to upload files and ask questions, with all processing performed locally on the device using Apple Foundation Models. It extracts text from various file types, transcribes audio, and provides contextual answers and summaries without requiring internet connectivity.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
